name_en: 💖《Full Original Green Box Packaging》💖Aphrodite Small Shoulder Bag. Gucci explores the path of craftsmanship with modern design aesthetics, cleverly blending classic brand elements with beloved brand icons. This small shoulder bag features ample space, crafted from black soft leather, with a striking double-G logo on the closure. Black soft leather, black enamel brass hardware with ceramic finish, microfiber lining, inside: one zip pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (30cm high) with double-G magnetic snap, weight: approx. 0.35kg.
